data.name: GeneralDescriptionTextBox.Text
data.value:
The Task Scheduler settings are READ-ONLY for now.
Writing to Task Scheduler settings will arrive in a later version, use Task Scheduler to change settings.

data.name: RunOnlyWhenUserIsLoggedOnRadioButton.Text
data.value: Run only when user is logged on

data.name: RunWhetherUserIsLoggedOnOrNotRadioButton.Text
data.value: Run whether user is logged on or not

data.name: RestartIfTheIdleStateResumesCheckBox.Text
data.value: Restart if the idle state resumes (Only in task scheduler)

data.name: StopIfTheComputerCeasesToBeIdleCheckBox.Text
data.value: Stop if the computer ceases to be idle

data.name: StartTheTaskOnlyIfTheComputerIsIdleForCheckBox.Text
data.value: Start the task only if the computer is idle for:

data.name: StartTheTaskOnlyIfTheComputerIsOnACPowerCheckBox.Text
data.value: Start the task only if the computer is on AC power

data.name: StopIfTheComputerSwitchesToBatteryPowerCheckBox.Text
data.value: Stop if the computer switches to battery power

data.name: WakeTheComputerToRunThisTaskCheckBox.Text
data.value: Wake the computer to run this task

data.name: IfTheTaskIsAlreadyRunningThenTheFollowingRuleAppliesComboBox.Items
data.value: Do not start a new instance

data.name: IfTheTaskIsAlreadyRunningThenTheFollowingRuleAppliesComboBox.Items1
data.value: Run a new instance in parallel

data.name: IfTheTaskIsAlreadyRunningThenTheFollowingRuleAppliesLabel.Text
data.value: If the task is already running, then the following rule applies:

data.name: IfTheRunningTaskDoesNotEndWhenRequestedForceItToStopCheckBox.Text
data.value: If the running task does not end when requested, force it to stop

data.name: StopTheTaskIfItRunsLongerThanCheckBox.Text
data.value: Stop the task if it runs longer than:

data.name: IfTheTaskFailsRestartEveryCheckBox.Text
data.value: If the task fails, restart every:

data.name: RunTaskAsSoonAsPossibleAfterAScheduledStartIsMissedCheckBox.Text
data.value: Run task as soon as possible after a scheduled start is missed

data.name: AllowTaskToBeRunOnDemandCheckBox.Text
data.value: Allow task to be run on demand
